description: Expand test coverage for the ml-platform. Add tests for modules that currently lack coverage, fix any import issues that prevent tests from running, and ensure the full test suite passes.
steps: Install ml-platform dependencies: cd ml-platform && pip install -e '.[dev]' and also pip install feast==0.40.1 (from dependency-groups.dev in pyproject.toml).
Run the existing test suite to establish baseline: cd ml-platform && pytest tests/ -v --tb=short. Note any failures.
Fix any test failures caused by the import issues fixed in FEAT-002 (ensure sys import and src.utils prefix are correct).

Add new test file `ml-platform/tests/test_main.py` that tests the main.py module: test that main() function exists, test argument parsing for each subcommand (train, inference, validate, create-sample, setup), test that calling with --help does not crash. Follow the pattern in tests/test_cli.py.

Add new test file `ml-platform/tests/test_pipelines.py` that tests the pipeline modules: test TrainingPipeline initialization, test InferencePipeline initialization, test that pipeline classes have the expected methods. Import from src.pipelines.training_pipeline and src.pipelines.inference_pipeline.
Run the full test suite again: cd ml-platform && pytest tests/ -v --tb=short. Ensure all tests pass (or skip gracefully with pytest.skip for tests requiring external services).
Report the final test count and pass rate.
acceptance_criteria: cd ml-platform && pytest tests/ -v runs without crashes (exit code 0 or only expected skips)
ml-platform/tests/test_main.py exists with at least 3 test functions covering argument parsing
ml-platform/tests/test_pipelines.py exists with at least 3 test functions covering pipeline classes
No import errors when running the test suite
Total test count is higher than before (baseline was 8 test files)
verification: cd ml-platform && pip install -e '.[dev]' && pytest tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20
findings: Baseline: 96 passed, 1 failed (pre-existing test_load_config), 1 skipped. After adding test_main.py (14 tests) and test_pipelines.py (23 tests): 133 passed, 1 failed (same pre-existing), 1 skipped. feast==0.40.1 needed for feature store tests to collect. The registry.db binary file gets modified by feast import but was not committed.
